lines.text: Acolyte Phoebe, can our prayers really reach those devoured by the Dark Tide? Or will they also...
I see. We will carry on our prayers for the fallen!
Acolyte Phoebe, I've put together a list of missing Acolytes from the Fabricatorium of the Deep. Acolyte Luther is counting on your help to coordinate the response.
But Acolyte Phoebe, what about the missing Acolytes from the Fabricatorium? The Privy Council also expects you to brief them in tomorrow morning's meeting.
I couldn't agree more. Acolyte Phoebe, let us share the burden!
